schema.name: grep_search
schema.description: Searches text files with a JavaScript regular expression under the NDX virtual root. Prefer project-relative paths like apps/... for project files; never write them as /apps/.... Independent grep_search/read_file calls can be batched in one model response.

pattern.description: JavaScript RegExp source. Alternation like foo|bar and whitespace patterns like class\s+Name are supported.

path.description: File or directory to search. Defaults to project root. Prefer project-relative paths; absolute paths must stay under the NDX virtual root.

glob.description: Optional glob filter such as *.ts, src/**/*.tsx, or **/*.{ts,tsx}.

limit.description: Maximum matching lines returned across all files. Defaults to 100.
